C:\\Users\\Shado\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Pro.serviceRawFile:
service: ats-integration-service

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.10
  environment:
    ATS_API_KEY: ${env:ATS_API_KEY}
    ATS_BASE_URL: ${env:ATS_BASE_URL}

functions:
  getJobs:
    handler: handler.get_jobs
    events:
      - http:
          path: jobs
          method: get

  createCandidate:
    handler: handler.create_candidate
    events:
      - http:
          path: candidates
          method: post

  getApplications:
    handler: handler.get_applications
    events:
      - http:
          path: applications
          method: get

plugins:
  - serverless-offline
